category_sources: source_facts.description says develop software for GNOME; official Apps for GNOME page calls Builder an Integrated Development Environment for GNOME.
display_name_sources: Official Apps for GNOME page display name is Builder.
docs_sources: Official Apps for GNOME page links Builder's online help page at builder.readthedocs.io.
repo_sources: Official Welcome to GNOME contribution page links the code repository for Builder to GNOME GitLab.
tags_sources: Official Apps for GNOME page lists IDE, GTK/GNOME APIs, code editor, debugger, Git integration, and Flatpak runtime support.
